en_title: Rockstar Should Charge $200 for GTA 6, Analyst Says, as It'll Be 'The Last Great Game' Before Everything is Built Using AI
cn_title: 分析师称Rockstar《GTA6》应定价200美元(约合人民币1356元)：这是AI时代前的最后大作
subtitle: 十年人力打造的最后大作
opus_summary: 分析师认为《GTA6》几乎完全诞生于AI工具普及前，是十年人力与三A级工艺的结晶，Rockstar定价80美元(约合人民币542元)远低于实际价值，甚至应该卖到200美元(约合人民币1356元)。

paragraphs.en: Rockstar's $80 price for Grand Theft Auto 6 is less than half what the game is worth, one analyst has suggested.
paragraphs.cn: 一名分析师表示，Rockstar为《侠盗猎车手6（GTA6）》制定的80美元(约合人民币542元)售价，还不到这款游戏实际价值的一半。

paragraphs.en: Arguing that the game is the work of a decade of human "blood, sweat and tears", and completed largely before the widespread proliferation of AI game development tools, Thompson said that Rockstar's highly-anticipated project should be valued at more like $200.
paragraphs.cn: Thompson认为，这款游戏凝聚了人类十年的「血汗泪」，且大部分内容在AI游戏开发工具广泛普及前完成，因此Rockstar这款备受期待的作品更应价值200美元(约合人民币1356元)。

paragraphs.en: "Rockstar is charging way too little for this game," Thompson said. "They should be charging like $200 for this game.
paragraphs.cn: Thompson说：「Rockstar给这款游戏定价实在太低了。他们应该卖到200美元(约合人民币1356元)左右。」

paragraphs.en: "GTA 6 is the last great game," he continued. "It was mostly all made pre-AI. It is the pinnacle of triple-A craftsmanship. Years and years and years of blood, sweat, and tears. To the extent where you have the Twitter analysts counting cigarette butts outside Rockstar's offices to see how much crunch are they in right now."
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说道：「《GTA6》是最后一部伟大游戏。它基本上是在AI时代前制作的，是三A级工艺的顶峰，凝聚了年复一年的血汗泪。甚至有Twitter分析人士在Rockstar办公室外数烟头，以判断他们现在加班有多严重。」

paragraphs.en: Rockstar confirmed GTA 6's $80 price (and $100 Ultimate Edition) last month after mounting speculation over how much the company would ultimately charge. There had been plenty of discussion around GTA 6 being priced higher than any other game before it, in order to earn back as much of its enormous development costs as quickly as possible. (Estimates have placed its development and marketing costs anywhere between $1 billion and $2 billion.)
paragraphs.cn: 在外界对最终售价的猜测不断升温后，Rockstar上月确认《GTA6》售价80美元(约合人民币542元)，终极版售价100美元(约合人民币678元)。此前不少人讨论过，本作是否会定出高于以往任何游戏的价格，以尽快收回巨额开发成本；据估算，其开发与营销成本介于10亿至20亿美元(约合人民币136亿元)之间。

paragraphs.en: But the majority of analysts agreed that Rockstar would likely stay conservative in its pricing, in order to get the game in the hands of as many players as possible. Price GTA 6 at $100 and millions would still buy it, sure, but some would be put off — players who could have become lucrative sources of further income down the road.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，大多数分析师都认为Rockstar可能会采取保守定价，让尽可能多的玩家买到游戏。当然，即使《GTA6》定价100美元(约合人民币678元)，仍会有数百万人购买，但也会劝退一部分玩家，而这些人原本可能在未来带来可观的后续收入。

paragraphs.en: While the portion of GTA 6 available at launch will be single-player, Rockstar will undoubtedly be eyeing similar profits to those reaped by GTA 5's multiplayer portion in the long-term, whenever the next version of GTA Online arrives .
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》首发内容虽然是单人模式，但无论新版《GTA Online》何时推出，Rockstar无疑都会期待它长期带来与《GTA5》多人模式类似的利润。

paragraphs.en: "I feel compelled to buy GTA 6 just in honor of it existing, even if I don't know if I'll ever play it," Thompson concluded. "And I'll be happy to pay $200." Previously, IGN polled analysts on whether GTA 6's $80 price point had opened the door to more expensive games — here's what they said .
paragraphs.cn: Thompson总结道：「为了向《GTA6》的存在致敬，我觉得自己必须购买它，即使不知道以后是否真的会玩。我也很乐意支付200美元(约合人民币1356元)。」此前，IGN曾询问分析师《GTA6》的80美元(约合人民币542元)定价是否为更昂贵的游戏打开了大门。

paragraphs.en: The past few weeks have seen a flood of information on GTA 6 materialize, as Rockstar finally begins the game's lengthy marketing campaign ahead of its long-awaited launch this November. While new screenshots of the game look stunning , fans have criticized , something that perhaps makes more sense following Sony's shock announcement today that it will eventually kill off PS5 game discs . Indeed, there's no sign of a disc-based GTA 6 launch happening down the line, either.
paragraphs.cn: 随着Rockstar终于为这款将于今年11月发售的期待之作启动长期营销，过去几周涌现了大量《GTA6》信息。游戏新截图令人惊艳，但粉丝也批评了[原文此处缺失内容]；在索尼今天突然宣布最终将停止PS5游戏光盘后，这种批评或许更容易理解。事实上，目前也没有迹象表明《GTA6》今后会推出光盘版。

paragraphs.en: There's been more drama behind the scenes, too, as more Rockstar employees attempt to unionize . Oh, and don't expect the game to run at 60fps on current consoles , either.
paragraphs.cn: 幕后也有更多风波，越来越多Rockstar员工正尝试成立工会。另外，也不要期待本作能在当前主机上以60fps运行。
